indicators.name: tub in the middle of the floor
indicators.rationale: The presence of a tub in the middle of the floor obstructs any open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: tiles on the floor
indicators.rationale: Tiles are not suitable for yoga practice as they can be slippery and uncomfortable compared to a smooth wooden floor.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the presence of a tub in the middle of the floor and the use of tiles instead of a smooth wooden floor. The score of 1 reflects the complete lack of open floor space and the unsuitable surface material.
